case_title: CRISTINA GARCIA VS. SUSAN THERESA ESPOSITO

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, CRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA $2,009.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,084.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GARCIA, CRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CRISTINA GARCIA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER VICTOR MARTINEZ #300740. DEFENDANT SUSAN ESPOSITO IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED, TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE CSM-18-858105. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2018 BY PRO TEM BRUCE LUBARSKY. 506 PLAINTIFF CRISTINA GARCIA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY #301386. DEFENDANT SUSAN ESPOSITO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY GARCIA, CRISTINA ESPOSITO, SUSAN THERESA
